item.title: AdrianCurtin/processFNIRS2
item.description: Modular MATLAB toolbox for fNIRS analysis: import, preprocessing, hemoglobin conversion, QC, block/GLM modeling, group statistics (LME), connectivity & hyperscanning, and 3D visualization / diffuse optical tomography.
